title: Grammar Constraint Precomputed2 Data
description: A schema for the serialized (Precomputed2, Trie2GodWrapper) tuple, which represents the precomputed trie for grammar-based token generation.

items.description: The Precomputed2 map, mapping from TokenizerStateID to the root index of its corresponding trie in the arena.
The arena (Trie2GodWrapper) containing all Trie nodes.

Precomputed2Map.description: A map from TokenizerStateID to the root index of its corresponding trie.

HybridBitset.description: A compact representation of a set of integers, as an array of [start, end] inclusive ranges.

TrieNodeValue.description: The value stored within a Trie node (PrecomputedNodeContents).

end.description: True if this node can be a terminal state in the precomputed trie.

live_tokens.description: A bitset of LLM tokens that can pass through or end at this node.

EdgeKey.description: An edge key of type (usize, Option<StateID>).

items.description: Number of items to pop from the GLR stack.
An optional GLR StateID to check after popping.
EdgeValue (LLMTokenBV): a bitset of LLM tokens allowed on this edge.

EdgeDestinationMap.description: A map from destination node index to the edge value (LLMTokenBV).

TrieChildrenMap.description: The children of a Trie node, mapping from an EdgeKey to a map of destinations.

TrieNode.description: A single node in the Precompute2 Trie.

max_depth.description: The longest path from a root to this node.

TrieArena.description: An arena storing all Trie nodes for Precompute2.

counter.description: The next available index in the arena.

values.description: A sparse array of [index, TrieNode] pairs.

items.description: The index of the node in the arena.
